description: Align login page to prototype with pixel-accurate dark/light variants and responsive behavior.

userStories.title: Rebuild login layout geometry to prototype metrics
userStories.description: As a platform user, I want the login page container, top bar, and two-column panels to match the prototype so that the page has consistent visual structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Top bar uses fixed prototype geometry and typography for brand/nav/locale text
Main login area uses prototype dimensions, panel widths, paddings, and corner radii
Dark and light layout skeleton use prototype background and surface colors
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Align form controls and OAuth area to prototype
userStories.description: As a user, I want input fields, sign-in button, helper text, and OAuth entry layout to match the prototype so that login interactions feel consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Username/password fields and submit button match prototype heights, radii, and spacing
OAuth area uses icon-circle plus caption layout instead of rectangular provider buttons
Form title, note, labels, helper text, and hints match prototype typography scales
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix light-route classing and responsive prototype variants
userStories.description: As a user, I want /light/login and mobile breakpoints to map to the intended prototype variants so that each route renders the correct theme and structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Body class toggles dark and light login variants based on route prefix
ConfigProvider algorithm follows route variant for login page
Tablet and mobile breakpoints reflect prototype structure and spacing
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
